description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof, typical of contemporary urban residences. The exterior is predominantly a light, neutral color, with large rectangular windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure appears to be single-story, with a clear separation between the main living area and an adjacent, smaller detached unit, possibly a garage or storage room. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some larger panes facing what is likely the front and side of the house. The main entryway is understated, lacking a prominent porch or decorative columns, and is integrated into the overall minimalist aesthetic. The house sits low to the ground, emphasizing horizontal lines and a streamlined profile.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a minimalist, boxy design. The exterior is light-colored and features a detached smaller unit nearby.
description_view_0: The main facade shows large windows and the main entry area, with the detached unit visible to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the house and the separation between the main structure and the detached unit.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals smaller windows and a more closed-off appearance, with the detached unit now on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the back and side of the house, with the detached unit in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with no porch or decorative elements, integrated into the facade
